nameMeanings.name: Nachtan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Mordecai.  German Erwin, Lothar, Inge, Wolf.
Jewish: from the Hebrew post-Biblical male personal name Nachman ‘consoler’. Compare Nachtman 1.
Americanized form of German Nachmann: shortened form of Nachtmann ‘night watchman’ (see Nachtman 3).

variants.name: Nachtman
meanings: Americanized form of German Nachtmann: occupational name for a night watchman.

en.lifeSummary: Nachtan MacGilmory was born in 1140, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Naughton nee Nachtan Mac Gilmory. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Nachten. He died in 1190, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

ko.lifeSummary: Nachtan MacGilmory(은)는 1140년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 Naughton nee Nachtan Mac Gilmory의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Nachten(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
